chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Suffices for the Visit to Imam Al-Husayn {a.s}, in the State of Taqiyyah

parts.text: اِلْبَسْ ثَوْبَيْكَ اَلطَّاهِرَيْنِ ثُمَّ اِئْتِ اَلْقَبْرَ
قُلْ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ

text: حَالِ اَلتَّقِيَّةِ رَوَى ذَلِكَ يُونُسُ بْنُ ظَبْيَانَ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3201 - When you arrive at the Euphrates River, perform ghusl (ritual purification), wear your two pure garments, and then proceed to the grave. Say:
"May Allah’s (swt) blessings be upon you, O Aba Abdillah.
May Allah’s (swt) blessings be upon you, O Aba Abdillah.
May Allah’s (swt) blessings be upon you, O Aba Abdillah."
With this, your visitation is complete under the condition of taqiyya (precautionary dissimulation).
This was narrated by Yunus ibn Zabyan from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as).
